system.description:
A sway of the hips.

A flash of skin.

A punch to the face.

LEVEL 3

Center of Attention. Your unarmed strikes Taunt the target until you drop to 0 HP.

Dance Partner. (1/round) When an enemy within Reach 2 misses you with an attack, you may gain a Wound to Charm it. At the beginning of the Charmed enemy's turn, they make a WIL save (DC 10+KEY) to end the condition.

LEVEL 7

Fatal Choreography. When you attack a Taunted or Charmed enemy using Swiftstrike, your attack is an automatic crit, ends the condition and causes the target to fall Prone.

LEVEL 11

Irresistible Rhythm. When you move, all enemies Taunted or Charmed by you also move 3 spaces in a direction of your choice. This counts as voluntary movement and may provoke attacks of opportunity.

LEVEL 15

Murder on the Dance Floor. (1/encounter) Action: All enemies Taunted or Charmed by you attack their closest target, friend or foe. If there are no valid target, they attack themselves.
